empathy_snapshots.empathy_snapshot: Began delegating, then quietly took the wheel back when the change went dark.

emotional_journey_moments.what_happened: files changed without a visible diff

evidence_citations.quote: honestly I ended up babysitting it the whole time.

empathy_snapshots.empathy_snapshot: Impatience gave way to relief the moment the diff made the change legible.

evidence_citations.quote: the diff view finally showed me what happened and I relaxed.

empathy_findings.empathy_language: They were happy to hand off the work; they just did not want to lose sight of the outcome they were still responsible for.
empathy_findings.stakeholder_implications: Visibility is a trust prerequisite, not a nice-to-have.
